name: a cloud-agnostic vision with no cloud stated anywhere fires no cloud platform type
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-intake.sh" --workload "a platform that assesses skills and issues credentials" --classify 2>/dev/null | ruby -rjson -e 'c=JSON.parse(STDIN.read)["workload_classification"]; exit(["aws-platform","azure-platform","gcp-platform"].any?{|t|c["workload_types"].include?(t)} ? 1:0)' && echo no-cloud-without-signal 1>&2
